datasets.title: Keppet Open Sports — f1
attribution: F1 data by F1DB (https://github.com/f1db/f1db), licensed CC BY 4.0
Market prices via Polymarket public API

result.note: f1db CC BY backbone: every world-championship session 1950-present.

perf.note: Pit-stop counts from f1db's pit-stop data era (1994+); earlier races have no per-stop records.
perf.wouldUnblock: A licensed historical pit-stop dataset for pre-1994 seasons.

form.note: Drivers' standings after every round, f1db 1950-present.

cond.note: Open-Meteo hourly reanalysis joined by venue coordinates; model estimate at the venue, not track-side sensor data.

avail.note: No keyless personnel-status feed exists for F1; driver substitutions surface only post-hoc in results.

market.note: Prediction markets (Polymarket) 2024-present only; no keyless bookmaker odds history for F1. Public per owner decision 2026-07-19 (OQ #6 closed: rights unlocated, not denied); excluded from commercial delivery.
market.wouldUnblock: A licensed historical odds feed would extend the floor past 2024.

meas.note: Fastest race lap from f1db (stepped horizon: timing precision improves by era). Speed-trap and telemetry measurements have no license-clean source (SR G7).

agg.note: f1db source-published driver season and career totals; independent cross-check for card-derived aggregates.

h2h.note: Derived-only from stored result rows over shared events; no stored metric (OM §14.1).

history.deep: Full observation history (all seasons) and forward-accumulated state series are private. Contact the maintainer for the deep data artifact.
